Summary Tables and Figures

Arnaud

2026-07-05

Dataset

dataset <- read_csv(
  here("output", "dataset_patients_combined.csv.gz"),
  col_types = cols(
    patient_id = col_integer(),
    age = col_double()
  )
)

dataset <- dataset %>%
  select(
    patient_id,
    index_date,
    sex,
    age,
    imd,
    ethnicity,
    stp,
    region,
    has_medication
  )

dataset$index_date <- as.Date(dataset$index_date)
head(dataset)
## # A tibble: 6 × 9
##   patient_id index_date sex      age imd   ethnicity stp   region has_medication
##        <int> <date>     <chr>  <dbl> <chr> <chr>     <chr> <chr>           <dbl>
## 1          1 2022-02-28 unkno…    90 Miss… All othe… E540… London              0
## 2          2 2022-02-28 female    93 3     White an… E540… North…              0
## 3          3 2022-02-28 male      59 Miss… Other Mi… E540… South…              0
## 4          4 2022-02-28 unkno…   106 Miss… Missing   E540… North…              0
## 5          5 2022-02-28 male       3 2     Other So… E540… Yorks…              0
## 6          6 2022-02-28 male      85 Miss… Missing   E540… South…              0

Table 1. Distribution of patients receiving medication by IMD

table_imd <- dataset %>%
  group_by(imd) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    n_with_medication = sum(has_medication == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_with_medication =
      round(100 * n_with_medication / n_patients, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(imd)

kable(
  table_imd,
  caption = "Table 1. Distribution of patients receiving medication by IMD."
)
Table 1. Distribution of patients receiving medication by IMD.
imd n_patients n_with_medication percent_with_medication
1 (Most Deprived) 1299 0 0
2 886 0 0
3 1490 0 0
4 538 0 0
5 (Least Deprived) 1071 0 0
Missing 18027 0 0

Figure 1. Patients receiving medication over time by IMD

table_imd_plot <- dataset %>%
  group_by(index_date, imd) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(imd != "Missing")

ggplot(
  table_imd_plot,
  aes(
    x = index_date,
    y = n_patients,
    colour = imd,
    group = imd
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "IMD"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

Figure 1. Patients receiving medication over time by IMD.

Table 2. Distribution of patients receiving medication by Region

table_region <- dataset %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    n_with_medication = sum(has_medication == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_with_medication =
      round(100 * n_with_medication / n_patients, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(region)

kable(
  table_region,
  caption = "Table 2. Distribution of patients receiving medication by Region."
)
Table 2. Distribution of patients receiving medication by Region.
region n_patients n_with_medication percent_with_medication
East 2197 0 0
East Midlands 624 0 0
London 2131 0 0
Missing 5628 0 0
North East 1747 0 0
North West 1924 0 0
South East 1609 0 0
South West 2168 0 0
West Midlands 2883 0 0
Yorkshire and The Humber 2400 0 0

Figure 2. Patients receiving medication over time by Region

table_region_plot <- dataset %>%
  group_by(index_date, region) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(region != "Missing")

ggplot(
  table_region_plot,
  aes(
    x = index_date,
    y = n_patients,
    colour = region,
    group = region
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "Region"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

Figure 2. Patients receiving medication over time by Region.

Table 3. Distribution of patients receiving medication by Sex

table_sex <- dataset %>%
  group_by(sex) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    n_with_medication = sum(has_medication == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_with_medication =
      round(100 * n_with_medication / n_patients, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(sex)

kable(
  table_sex,
  caption = "Table 3. Distribution of patients receiving medication by sex."
)
Table 3. Distribution of patients receiving medication by sex.
sex n_patients n_with_medication percent_with_medication
female 10173 0 0
intersex 3710 0 0
male 5689 0 0
unknown 3739 0 0

Figure 3. Patients receiving medication over time by Sex

table_sex_plot <- dataset %>%
  group_by(index_date, sex) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sex))

ggplot(
  table_sex_plot,
  aes(
    x = index_date,
    y = n_patients,
    colour = sex,
    group = sex
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "Sex"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

Figure 3. Patients receiving medication over time by sex.

Table 4. Distribution of patients receiving medication by Ethnicity

table_ethnicity <- dataset %>%
  group_by(ethnicity) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    n_with_medication = sum(has_medication == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_with_medication =
      round(100 * n_with_medication / n_patients, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(ethnicity)

kable(
  table_ethnicity,
  caption = "Table 4. Distribution of patients receiving medication by ethnicity."
)
Table 4. Distribution of patients receiving medication by ethnicity.
ethnicity n_patients n_with_medication percent_with_medication
African 1486 0 0
All other ethnic groups 3121 0 0
Bangladeshi 201 0 0
Caribbean 763 0 0
Chinese 420 0 0
Indian 508 0 0

Other Black 667 0 0

Pakistani 518 0 0
White British 968 0 0
White Irish 456 0 0
White and African 735 0 0
White and Asian 635 0 0
White and Caribbean 510 0 0

Figure 4. Patients receiving medication over time by Ethnicity

table_ethnicity_plot <- dataset %>%
  group_by(index_date, ethnicity) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(ethnicity),
    ethnicity != "Missing"
  )

ggplot(
  table_ethnicity_plot,
  aes(
    x = index_date,
    y = n_patients,
    colour = ethnicity,
    group = ethnicity
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "Ethnicity"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

Figure 4. Patients receiving medication over time by ethnicity.
